Bevin E. Allen-Pike, Esq. of Khorrami Bouchar Sumner Sanguinetti LLP, Tel. 213.596.6000, for plaintiff and moving party, via Court Call;

Ryan T. Hansen, Esq. of DLA Piper LLP, Tel. 619.699.2852, for defendant Jamba Juice.

RULING: The matter was discussed. For good cause and to the satisfaction of the Court, PLAINTIFF MICHAEL RAPPAPORT's Motion For Approval Of Class Action Settlement is granted. Moving party to submit a proposed order and a proposed judgment. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
